---
title: "Legacy ETL Compiler"
author: "Mark London"
date: "2026-03-05"

format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    footer: "WAS RADAR"
    logo: "WAS_RADAR.png"
    chalkboard: false

css: styles.css

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

## Overview

- Purpose: migrate SPSS/PSPP logic into R pipelines
- Verification & validation cycle

---

## Architecture

```{dot}
digraph {

  rankdir=LR;
  bgcolor="transparent";
  fontname="Helvetica";
  fontsize=22;

  node [
    shape=box
    style="rounded,filled"
    fontname="Helvetica"
    fontsize=20
    fillcolor="#F8F9FA"
    color="#1F4E79"
    penwidth=2
  ];

  edge [
    color="#1F4E79"
    penwidth=3
  ];

  subgraph cluster_parser {
    label="Parser & Topology";
    fontsize=24;
    style=filled;
    fillcolor="#E8F1FA";
    color="#1F4E79";
    penwidth=2;

    A [label="SPSS / PSPP Script"];
    B [label="GraphBuilder"];
    C [label="Raw Topology YAML"];

    A -> B -> C;
  }

  subgraph cluster_optimizer {
    label="Optimizer";
    fontsize=24;
    style=filled;
    fillcolor="#EAF7EA";
    color="#2E7D32";
    penwidth=2;

    D [label="Optimized Topology YAML"];

    C -> D;
  }

  subgraph cluster_codegen {
    label="Code Generation";
    fontsize=24;
    style=filled;
    fillcolor="#FFF3E0";
    color="#E65100";
    penwidth=2;

    E [label="R Generator"];
    F [label="Pipeline.R"];

    D -> E -> F;
  }

  subgraph cluster_verif {
    label="Verification";
    fontsize=24;
    style=filled;
    fillcolor="#F3E5F5";
    color="#6A1B9A";
    penwidth=2;

    G [label="PSPP"];
    H [label="Rscript"];

    A -> G;
    F -> H;
  }

}
```

---

## State Machine

- Operations = nodes
- States = datasets
- Enables dependency checking & optimizations

```{dot}
digraph {

  graph [
    rankdir=LR
    nodesep=1.0
    ranksep=1.2
    fontname="Helvetica"
    fontsize=22
  ]

  node [
    shape=box
    style="rounded,filled"
    fillcolor="#E8F1FA"
    color="#1F4E79"
    penwidth=2
    fontname="Helvetica"
    fontsize=20
  ]

  edge [
    color="#1F4E79"
    penwidth=3
  ]

  A [label="GET DATA"]
  B [label="SORT CASES"]
  C [label="COMPUTE\nage_group ← age / 10"]
  D [label="RECODE\nage_group"]

  A -> B -> C -> D
}
```

---

## Environment Considerations

- Linux (Rscript + PSPP easily installed)
- Windows: R via VS Code, PSPP absent -> configurable commands or skip

---

## Usage

```bash
python src/compiler.py --manifest demo/input/logic.sps \
  --pspp-cmd "echo PSPP skipped" \
  --rscript-cmd Rscript
```

---

## Questions?

*Detailed notes available in `docs/system_explanation.qmd`.*
